title: Scotland Backs ZeroAvia's Hydrogen Propulsion Manufacturing Site

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Scotland Backs ZeroAvia's Hydrogen Propulsion Manufacturing Site in Glasgow | Aviation International News ZeroAvia plans to produce hydrogen propulsion systems for aircraft near Glasgow Airport in Scotland. Molicel Batteries Will Power Vaeridion's Electric Microliner European group’s helicopter division makes strong contribution to 2025 financials Airlines and special-missions applications are in the Dutch start-up’s sights

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Evolito Will Supply Propulsion Units for Vertical eVTOL Aircraft Ground tests will be done at either Changi or Seletar airports Experimental technology intended to complement existing engine nacelle capabilities
